overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing the protagonist Geralt walking through a sunlit countryside during golden hour. The character travels along a dirt path past stone walls and an ancient tree with fallen bodies, continuing through lush meadows toward a distant village.

scene_state.functional_zone: country path with stone walls and wildflowers

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path beside a stone wall, approaching a large ancient tree

entered.detail: rough stone wall running parallel to the path
massive gnarled oak tree with thick trunk and spreading branches ahead on the path
purple and red wildflowers growing in the grass beside the path
winding dirt trail with patches of grass

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow country path bordered by a stone wall on the left and wildflowers on the right. Dappled sunlight filters through the trees as the character approaches a massive ancient oak tree in the distance.

events.description: character walks past blood stains and dead bodies on the ground beneath the ancient tree

agents.ego_description: walking past the remains of a recent battle under the ancient tree, observing the fallen bodies

notable_agents.action: lying dead on the ground near blood stains, victims of a recent attack

entered.detail: dark red blood stains splattered across the dirt path

segments.scene_description: The character passes beneath the massive canopy of the ancient oak tree, where blood stains and fallen bodies mark the site of a recent conflict. The stone wall falls away as the path continues through the shaded area under the tree's branches.

scene_state.functional_zone: open countryside trail with distant mountains

agents.ego_description: walking along the winding path through open meadows with mountains visible in the distance

entered.detail: hazy mountain range visible on the horizon
brief return of the stone wall alongside the path

segments.scene_description: Emerging from under the ancient tree, the landscape opens into wide meadows with distant mountains on the horizon. The stone wall briefly returns alongside the path before the trail continues through rolling green hills.

events.description: path ahead splits into two directions with blooming trees becoming visible

agents.ego_description: walking toward a fork in the road surrounded by blooming trees and distant village structures

entered.detail: dirt path splitting into two directions ahead
trees with white blossoms lining the left side of the approaching fork
faint outlines of buildings in the valley beyond the fork

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the trail as the path ahead splits into a fork, with blooming orchard trees visible on the left. The landscape reveals a distant village nestled in the valley beyond, bathed in warm golden hour light.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rural path that transforms from a sheltered woodland trail into a vast, sun-drenched valley. It begins with the character walking beside a stone wall and wildflowers under dappled sunlight, moving steadily toward a massive ancient oak tree. As the camera passes beneath the tree's heavy canopy, the scene shifts into a shaded area marked by blood stains and fallen bodies before the stone wall disappears. The landscape then opens into wide, rolling green meadows with distant mountains on the horizon as the character emerges from the shadows. Finally, the trail leads toward a fork in the road flanked by blooming orchard trees, revealing a distant village nestled in the valley under the warm glow of the golden hour.
